/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/wmbus-gateway.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/wmbus-gateway.dir/src/serial_port.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/wmbus-gateway.dir/src/metis_protocol.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/wmbus-gateway.dir/src/wmbus_parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/wmbus-gateway.dir/src/mqtt_client.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/wmbus-gateway.dir/src/log.cpp.o" -o wmbus-gateway  /opt/homebrew/lib/libmosquitto.dylib
